AI DeFi QuantEnglish

Mining robot profit model

AI Mining Principle: We use a combination of Proof of Stake and AI algorithms to automatically generate Bitcoin, which is then converted into USDT. The entire process is intelligently managed, with no user intervention required.
Security: Funds are stored in your encrypted wallet, offering 100% security and are fully withdrawable. With bank-level security, your funds are fully under your control, so there is no need to worry about recovering your initial investment. Your USDT (BEP20) will generate new coins within the system, replacing traditional mining.
Earnings Model: Simply participate to generate new coins, with no technical knowledge or actions needed. The system operates around the clock, ensuring safety and stability, with no need for transfers or staking, and funds are self-managed.

  1. Step 1: Connect your crypto wallet.
    Earn rewards based on your wallet balance.
  2. Step 2: Top up your crypto wallet.
    No need to transfer funds; keep assets in your wallet for security.
  3. Step 3: The platform starts automatic mining.
    Begin decentralized liquidity mining.
  4. Step 4: Receive rewards automatically.
    Share your exclusive link to earn more rewards.

Security: Funds are stored in your encrypted wallet, offering 100% security and are fully withdrawable. Your USDT (BEP20) will generate new coins within the system, replacing traditional mining.

Help center
    1. How do i need to join?
      To participate, you need to pay the miner's fee to receive the reissued gold coupon, and the wallet address only needs to be claimed once. The activity permission is automatically enabled after success.
    2. How do i withdraw money?
      You can convert the currency generated every day into USDT, and then initiate a withdrawal. USDT withdrawals will be automatically sent to the wallet address you added to the node, other addresses are not supported.
    3. How to calculate income?
      When you claim successfully, the smart contract starts to calculate your address through the node, and starts to calculate the income.
    4. What is the yield percentage rate?

      VIP1: 1-100 Yield rate 3.000% USDT
      VIP2: 101-1000 Yield rate 3.500% USDT
      VIP3: 1001-5000 Yield rate 4.000% USDT
      VIP4: 5001-10000 Yield rate 4.500% USDT
      VIP5: 10001-20000 Yield rate 5.000% USDT
      VIP6: 20001-50000 Yield rate 6.000% USDT
      VIP7: 50001-100000 Yield rate 7.000% USDT
      VIP8: 100001 above, Yield rate 8.000% USDT
    5. What are the extra gains?
      When you continue to participate in activities for a period of time, the mining pool will have a lot of rewards. For more details, please contact online customer service.
